title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at HDFC Ergo

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at HDFC Ergo
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, HDFC Ergo in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About HDFC Ergo:
HDFC Ergo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Ergo!
